response.step_by_step_log: 1. Identified the artist as Pavolia Reine and the song as "Figure It Out" from on-screen text in the top-left corner. 2. Used the search query "Figure It Out" Pavolia Reine lyrics. 3. Confirmed the song lyrics and artist/performer information. 4. Broken the video into two scenes based on the visual style change (3D performance to 2D animation). 5. Provided the lyrics for the song (the song itself is in English, so original and translation are the same).
response.global_summary: A music video/performance of the original song "Figure It Out" by Pavolia Reine. The video transitions from a 3D animated concert performance to a 2D/sketch-style animation, ending with a static promotional graphic.

scenes.description: Pavolia Reine performs on a 3D-rendered stage, playing bass guitar. Song title "Figure It Out" is displayed.
scenes.reference_lyrics_og:
Hey, hey, hey
(Never, never, never gonna figure it out!)
Hey, hey, hey
Hey, hey
(Never gonna figure it out!)

Wake up, another bloody monday
Say things I never wanted to say
Up in arms, who can I please?
You? Livin' day by day (Oh)

Wake up, another bloody monday (Oh)
Rinse and repeat until it’s Sunday (Oh)
Hold it, so frustrating
Ya know, I can't do it no more

Pre-Chorus
I'll say
No good, down to the core
I'll say
I'm so, I'm so, I'm so bored
I'm never gonna figure it out!

Chorus
So broken and pathetic
I like it that way, get it
It's brutal to settle
It's never that simple, but
I'm so on to meet your harsh criteria
To that, I'm never gonna
I'm never gonna
I'm never gonna
Figure it out!
